mapper.select: select id from categories where slug = #{slug}
mapper.insert: insert into categories (name, slug, description, sort_order) values (#{name}, #{slug}, '', 0)
mapper.select: select id from tags where slug = #{slug}
mapper.insert: insert into tags (name, slug, description) values (#{name}, #{slug}, '')
mapper.select: select count(*) > 0 from articles where slug = #{slug}
